title: Saro´s Create addon

# Adds a new recipe for diamonds and a recipe for netherite with the mod Create (Not Too Overpowered)
 





 [![https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Create_Addon/BH_CA_PromoCard.webp "https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php ")](https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php "https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php")



**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
